card.name: Seiran, Thundering Star
card.text: Menace Seiran, Thundering Star gets +1/+0 for each card you have drawn this turn. If you would draw a card, draw two cards, then discard a card instead.

card.name: Hellraisers Recruit
card.text: Technique shift {R} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {R} instant with only bracketed text.) Prowess When Hellraisers Recruit enters, [b][it deals 2 damage to any target.][/b]

card.name: Savage Familiar
card.text: When Savage Familiar enters, create a 1/1 white and black Student creature token. Valiant — Whenever Savage Familiar becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Off the Rails
card.text: Off the Rails deals X damage to each creature and planeswalker, where X is the number of Terminals you control

card.name: Taraikyo Dramatist
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G} sorcery with only bracketed text.) When Taraikyo Dramatist enters, [b][put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control.][/b]

card.name: Rebellious Maiko
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Rebellious Maiko becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, surveil 1. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Hellraisers Seraph
card.text: Flying Whenever Hellraisers Seraph attacks you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, Hellraisers Seraph gets +2/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Disastrous Derailment
card.text: Choose one — • Disastrous Derailment deals 4 damage to target tapped creature. • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Zoology Professor
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Deathtouch

card.name: Perfect-Form Ascetic
card.text: Technique shift {1}{U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{U} instant with only bracketed text.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, up to one other [b][target creature you control has base power and toughness 4/4 until end of turn.] [/b]This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Scholarly Witness
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G} sorcery with only bracketed text.) When Scholarly Witness enters, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, you may [b][return target permanent card not named Scholarly Witness from your graveyard to your hand.][/b]

card.name: Railworks Security
card.text: Trample When Railworks Security enters, you gain 1 life for each Terminal you conrol. Terminalcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Terminal card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Raging Sarugami
card.text: Technique shift {X}{R} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {X}{R} instant with only bracketed text.) When Raging Sarugami enters, up to one [b][Target creature gets +X/+0 and gains trample until end of turn][/b], where X is the number of instant, sorcery and cards with technique shift in your graveyard.

card.name: Light-Hearted Goading
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a Spirit you control with mana value 4 or greater. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: High-Spirits Break
card.text: Enchant land Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of any color. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, Sacrifice High-Spirits Break: Enchanted land becomes a 4/4 Spirit creature with vigilance, hexproof, and haste. It's still a land. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Run the Rails
card.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards and/or Terminal cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Seek the Nightmares
card.text: Choose one — • Create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type. • Create an X/X Spirit Nightmare creature token that's all colors, where X is the number of lands you control.

card.name: Taraikyo Egotist
card.text: Prowess When Taraikyo Egotist enters, you may sacrifice a creature or discard a creature card. If you do, you gain 3 life and it studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Ebon Moon Descendant
card.text: Technique shift {1}{B}{B} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{B}{B} instant with only bracketed text.) Flash Flying When Ebon Moon Descendant enters, you may [b][destroy target creature or planeswalker] [/b]that was dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Contracted Aberrant
card.text: Technique shift {1}{U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{U} instant with only bracketed text.) When Contracted Aberrant dies, [b][look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.][/b]

card.name: One Stop to Oblivion
card.text: Return up to two target creature and/or planeswalker cards from your graveyard to your hand. Terminalcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Terminal card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Devilish Diva
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever another creature dies, Devilish Diva studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Hiruya Star Aspirant
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Hiruya Star Aspirant becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put your choice of a +1/+1, flying, vigilance, or lifelink counter on it.

card.name: Seijuku Star Pilot
card.text: Technique shift {2}{B} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {2}{B} sorcery with only bracketed text.) At the beginning of your end step, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, [b][return target creature or planeswalker card with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.] [/b]

card.name: Titanicoil Uwabami
card.text: Technique shift {2}{B} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {2}{B} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Trample When Titanicoil Uwabami enters, [b][put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control for each creature card in your graveyard.][/b] That creature gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: One Last Time
card.text: This spell costs {4} less to cast if it targets a creature that was put into a graveyard from the battlefield this turn. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Dazzling Dancers
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, tap up to one target creature. This ability triggers only one each turn.

card.name: Hollow Pact
card.text: Put up to two target creature cards from a single graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. They gain haste until end of turn. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Maki, the Unbridled
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Maki, the Unbridled becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, copy that spell or ability. You may choose new targets for the copy. (copies of permanents become tokens.)

card.name: Inspiring Senior
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white and black Student creature token.

card.name: Inked Delver
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant, sorcery and card with technique shift in your graveyard. Flash Inked Delver enters tapped if it's not your turn.

card.name: Legacy's Expectations
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If you've drawn two or more cards this turn, counter that spell unless its controller pays {4} instead.

card.name: Hajime, Hidanko Dean
card.text: Menace, prowess Whenever you cast a spell for its technique shift cost, exile it as it resolves. You may cast that card for its mana cost for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Ryujin of Life's Tenacity
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G} instant with only bracketed text.) Flying, trample Whenever Ryujin of Life's Tenacity attacks, [b][target creature you control gets +4/+4 until end of turn.] [/b]If it's another creature, put four +1/+1 counters on it instead.

card.name: Ryujin of Memory's Flow
card.text: Technique shift {2}{U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {2}{U} instant with only bracketed text.) Flying, vigilance Whenever Ryujin of Memory's Flow attacks, [b][exile up to two other target artifacts or creatures. Return them to the battlefield under their owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.][/b] Draw a card if a permanent you control was exiled this way.

card.name: Ryujin of Unfettered Joy
card.text: Technique shift {3}{R}{R} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {3}{R}{R} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Flying, first strike Whenever Ryujin of Unfettered Joy attacks, [b][Ryujin of Unfettered Joy deals 4 damage to each creature][/b] defending player controls.

card.name: Ryujin of Divine Justice
card.text: Technique shift {3}{W} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {3}{W} instant with only bracketed text.) Flying, lifelink Whenever Ryujin of Divine Justice attacks, [b][create two 2/1 white Spirit Samurai creature tokens][/b], then put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Ryujin of Night's Sorrow
card.text: Technique shift {1}{B} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{B} instant with only bracketed text.) Flying, menace Whenever Ryujin of Night's Sorrow attacks,[b] [each opponent sacrifices a creature.][/b] For each creature with mana value 3 or less sacrificed this way, put it onto the battlefield under your control. It enters tapped and attacking.

card.name: Inaba Sparkcaster
card.text: Prowess Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Sakura-Tail Blademaster
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) First strike, trample, haste

card.name: Fan ONI
card.text: This token can't block. At the beginning of your upkeep, this token deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Railworks Constructor
card.text: Affinity for Terminals (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Terminal you control.) Terminalcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Terminal card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Pact of New Return
card.text: Enchant creature When enchanted creature dies, return it to the battlefield under your control, then it studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Hollowed Knowledge
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. Flashback {4}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Soul Agency Street Patrol
card.text: Technique shift {U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {U} instant with only bracketed text.) Prowess When Soul Agency Street Patrol enters, [b][return up to one target creature to its owner's hand.][/b]

card.name: Invigorating Shrineguard
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Reach When Invigorating Shrineguard enters, [b][you gain 6 life.][/b]

card.name: Swordsmanship Club Clique
card.text: Technique shift {B} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {B} instant with only bracketed text.) Whenever Swordsmanship Club Clique attacks, another [b][target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn.][/b]

card.name: Delinquent Oni
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Delinquent Oni becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, up to one target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Thirst for Inspiration
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard an instant card, sorcery card, or card with technique shift.

card.name: Approach the Contract
card.text: Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Detention
card.text: Enchant creature You may cast Detention as though it had flash if you've cast another noncreature spell this turn. Enchanted creature loses all abilities can't become untapped.

card.name: Ryu-Blood Prefect
card.text: Lifelink Ryu-Blood Prefect gets +X/+0, where X is the number of Advisors you control.

card.name: Wall of Sorrows
card.text: Defender When Wall of Sorrows enters, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Okirumi Heartbreaker
card.text: Technique shift {U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {U} instant with only bracketed text.) Prowess, haste Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may [b][switch target creature's power and toughness until end of turn.][/b]

card.name: Reckless Rage
card.text: Reckless Rage deals 4 damage to target creature you don't control and 2 damage to target creature you control.

card.name: Helios Ignition
card.text: Helios Ignition deals 2 damage to any target. Up to one target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Inami, Taraikyo Star
card.text: Trample, lifelink Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures, each attacking creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control that aren't attacking.

card.name: Inugami Twins
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Double strike

card.name: Lost Identification
card.text: {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. {5}, {T}, Sacrifice Lost Identification: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of cards exiled with Lost Identification. Put up to two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Ryo, Old Ways Hellraiser
card.text: Technique shift {6}{W}{B} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {6}{W}{B} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Haste When Ryo, Old Ways Hellraiser enters, if it was cast[b], [return each creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield][/b] that died this turn. They gain haste. Exile them at the beginning of the next end step. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Optimistic Miko
card.text: Trample Valiant — Whenever Optimistic Miko becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, you may draw a card.

card.name: Consuming Adoration
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you draw a card and lose 1 life. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a permanent spell with mana value 4 or greater from your graveyard by discarding two cards in addition to paying its mana cost.

card.name: Hateful Seishin
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G} instant with only bracketed text.) Ward—Discard a card Whenever Hateful Seishin attacks, [b][target creature you control gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn.][/b]

card.name: Peak Hours
card.text: The owner of target noncreature spell or nonland permanent puts it into their library third from the top or on the bottom. Terminalcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Terminal card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Reiko, Battle Choreographer
card.text: Double strike At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile up to one target card from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of it if it targets a creature you control.

card.name: Gladewaker Seishin
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G} instant with only bracketed text.) Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, up to one [b][target land you control becomes a 4/4 Spirit creature with hexproof and haste until end of turn. It's still a land.][/b]

card.name: War-Stage Idol
card.text: Technique shift {2}{R} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {2}{R} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Menace Whenever War-Stage Idol enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or [b][discard a card. If you do, draw two cards and create a Treasure token.][/b]

card.name: Chieko, Untamed Rover
card.text: Technique shift {1}{U}{B} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{U}{B} instant with only bracketed text.) Haste Whenever Chieko, Untamed Rover attacks, you may [b][exile target instant card with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard. If you do, cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost.][/b]

card.name: Senzao Peak Skythresher
card.text: Technique shift {1}{W} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {1}{W} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Flying Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures, [b][Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a Plains card or creature card with power 3 or less from among them and put it into your hand, then shuffle.][/b]

card.name: Retrofitted Artillery
card.text: When Retrofitted Artillery enters, attach it to target creature you control. That creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one other target creature or planeswalker. Equipped creature has reach and ward {2}. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Lost Soulherder
card.text: Whenever Lost Soulherder attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If exactly two creatures are attacking, it studies instead. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Void Central Junction
card.text: Void Central Junction enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color. {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add one mana of the chosen color."

card.name: Seijuku Piloting Instructor
card.text: Technique shift {2}{W} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {2}{W} instant with only bracketed text.) When Seijuku Piloting Instructor enters, [b][tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on one of them.][/b]

card.name: Ryujin's Expulsion
card.text: Exile up to two cards from target player's graveyard and up to one target artifact, enchantment or creature with flying that player controls.

card.name: Everywhere
card.text: This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest. ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.)

card.name: Subsume Self
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You may exile a nonland card from it. For as long as that card remains exiled, its owner may play it. A spell cast this way costs {2} more to cast.

card.name: Disaster Site Surveyor
card.text: Technique shift {2}{R} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {2}{R} sorcery with only bracketed text.) When Disaster Site Surveyor dies, you may [b][return another target instant, sorcery or card with technique shift from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Disaster Site Surveyor][/b]

card.name: Highblood Sophomore
card.text: Technique shift {W} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {W} instant with only bracketed text.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one [b][target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.][/b]

card.name: Rainfall Companion
card.text: Reach {T}: Add one mana of any color. Whenever you cast a Spirit spell with mana value 4 or greater, put a +1/+1 counter on Rainfall Companion.

card.name: Greater Toad Sage
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn. Vigilance

card.name: Battleshaping Coordinators
card.text: Other Advisors you control get +1/+1. {2}{W}{U}, {T}: Create a 2/2 white and blue Student Advisor creature token.

card.name: Kuro, Bitter Shadow
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. {W}{B}: Sacrifice a creature: Kuro, Bitter Shadow gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: Omukade, Void Feaster
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, choose a nonland permanent type. Each opponent sacrifices a permanent they control of their choice of that type.

card.name: Twintuft Duelists
card.text: Lifelink, haste The first spell you cast or ability you activate each turn that targets a creature you control costs {R}{W} less to cast or activate. This effect reduces only the amount of colored mana you pay.

card.name: Flamejaw Apex
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G} instant with only bracketed text.) Trample When Flamejaw Apex enters, [b][target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.][/b]

card.name: End of the Line
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Other Terminals you control enter untapped. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: End of the Line becomes an X/X horror creature with hexproof and haste until end of turn, where X is the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Manifold Technique
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and have haste. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 white and black Student creature token.

card.name: Nightmares In Reality
card.text: When Nightmares In Reality enters, create two colorless land tokens named Everywhere that are every basic land type. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, you may create an X/X Spirit Nightmare creature token that's all colors, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast that spell. It can't block this turn. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Shrine-Lurker Ogama
card.text: Technique shift {2}{G} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {2}{G} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Shrine-Lurker Ogama gets +1/+1 for each land you control. When Shrine-Lurker Ogama enters, [b][search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.][/b]

card.name: Challenging Lesson
card.text: When Challenging Lesson enters, it deals damage to any target equal to the number of creatures you control. If an ability of a creature you control with base power 2 or less triggers, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Cat ONI
card.text: Haste

card.name: Spirit Horror ONI
card.text: Menace

card.name: Lost in Transit
card.text: When Lost in Transit enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Lost in Transit leaves the battlefield. Terminalcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Terminal card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Halfblade Instigator
card.text: Prowess, haste If a player would gain life, they gain that much life minus Halfblade Instigator's power instead.

card.name: Soul Agency Rookies
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) As long as its your turn, this creature gets +2/+0.

card.name: Shoji, Grounds Tender
card.text: Technique shift {4}{B}{R} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {4}{B}{R} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Flash When Shoji, Grounds Tender enters, [b][create a 2/2 black Cat creature token for each creature card in your graveyard][/b] that was put there from the battlefield this turn.

card.name: Akigara Grifter
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {T}: Target creature you control gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Academic Orrery
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Exile Academic Orrery: Return target instant, sorcery, or card with technique shift from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Dawn-Talon Proctor
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Flying Other creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Kaede, Drama Head
card.text: Technique shift {R}{G} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {R}{G} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Whenever Kaede, Drama Head enters or attacks, [b][look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 2 or less from among them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.][/b]

card.name: Exorcist Prodigy
card.text: Prowess If an ability of another creature with prowess you control triggers, it triggers an additional time.

card.name: Voidless Dreamer
card.text: Voidless Dreamer can't block. Exile an instant or sorcery spell you control: Return Voidless Dreamer from your graveyard to the battlefield. (That spell won't resolve.)

card.name: On Patrol
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, draw a card, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Railworks Signaller
card.text: When Railworks Signaller enters, search your library for a basic land card or Terminal card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Railworks Signaller gets +2/+2 as long as you control five or more differently named lands.

card.name: Orochi's Soulcaller
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, create a 1/1 black and green Hydra Horror creature token with trample and "This token gets +1/+1 for each other Hydra you control."

card.name: Daemthine, Dread Influencer
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 0/1 colorless Fan creature token. Sacrifice seven creatures: You draw seven cards and gain 7 life.

card.name: Kami-Blessed Spiritualist
card.text: Technique shift {X}{W} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {X}{W} instant with only bracketed text.) When Kami-Blessed Spiritualist enters or you cast a spell, you may[b] [exile target nonland permanent with mana value X or less][/b] where X is the amount of mana you've spent to cast spells this turn. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Obsessive Stalker
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Obsessive Stalker.

card.name: Class-Cutting Exorcist
card.text: When Class-Cutting Exorcist enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature, then sacrifice a creature unless you've cast a noncreature spell this turn.

card.name: Fireblood Seishin
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a land or discard a card: Draw a card. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you control a Spirit with mana value 4 or greater.

card.name: Enheartened Proposal
card.text: When Enheartened Proposal enters, you may discard two cards. If you do, draw three cards. {1}, Sacrifice Enheartened Proposal: Target creature you control with mana value 4 or greater gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Lazing Tanuki
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each differently named land you control. Reach

card.name: Friends Forgotten
card.text: Exile target creature or enchantment with mana value less than or equal to the greatest number of nonland cards in a graveyard.

card.name: Hydra Horror ONI
card.text: Trample This token gets +1/+1 for each other Hydra you control.

card.name: Derelict Connection
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Derelict Connection: Draw a card. Activate only if you control five or more Terminals. Other Terminals you control have "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw a card. Activate only if you control five or more Terminals."

card.name: Azure Gust Descendant
card.text: You may pay {U} and exile an instant and a sorcery card from your graveyard rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Flying, prowess

card.name: Social Encounters
card.text: Return up to one target creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of lands you control from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Underground Negotiations
card.text: Distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures. Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures, return Underground Negotiations from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Kyoko's Rejection
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. You may sacrifice a creature. If you don't, return the exiled card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Tangled Troubles
card.text: When Tangled Troubles enters, draw a card. Whenever you draw a card, target creature you control studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Sarugami Titan
card.text: Technique shift {2}{B} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {2}{B} instant with only bracketed text.) When Sarugami Titan enters, you may exile an instant, sorcery or card with technique shift from your graveyard. If you do, up to one [b][target creature gets +4/-4 until end of turn.][/b]

card.name: Ushi-Oni Ascetic
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Ushi-Oni Ascetic becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, double its power until end of turn.

card.name: Illicit Concert Tickets
card.text: When Illicit Concert Tickets enters, draw two cards, then discard two cards. {T}, Sacrifice Illicit Concert Tickets: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Spiritstealer Herd
card.text: Trample When Spiritstealer Herd enters, you gain X life and Spiritstealer Herd deals X damage to up to one target creature or planeswalker, where X is the number of lands you control.

card.name: Savvy Part-Timer
card.text: Haste Valiant — Whenever Savvy Part-Timer becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Cursebound Bully
card.text: Prowess At the beginning of your end step, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, each opponent loses life equal to the life they lost this turn.

card.name: Skilled Diabolist
card.text: Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, create a tapped 1/1 black Demon Horror creature token. Sacrifice an artifact or creature: Surveil 1.

card.name: Exorcist Trainee
card.text: Technique shift {4}{R} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {4}{R} sorcery with only bracketed text.) When Exorcist Trainee enters, if it entered from your graveyard or you cast it from your graveyard, exile it. If you do, [b][create a 5/5 black and red Spirit Horror creature token with menace.][/b]

card.name: Future Past
card.text: Draw four cards, then you may put a permanent card with mana value less than or equal to the number of Terminals you control from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Travel Outburst
card.text: Travel Outburst deals 6 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If a permanent dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead. Terminalcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Terminal card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Hollowed Vanguard
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you attack with exactly two creatures, they each get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Eager Soulseeker
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Flying

card.name: Impairing Oarfish
card.text: Whenever a Terminal you control enters, Impairing Oarfish can't be blocked this turn. Whenever Impairing Oarfish deals damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card.

card.name: Kitsune Heiress
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice another permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on Kitsune Heiress. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Shrineguard Gatekeeper
card.text: Menace When Shrineguard Gatekeeper enters, target creature you control studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Overwhelmed Staff
card.text: Vigilance At the beginning of your end step, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Battle-Rage Komainus
card.text: Other Spirits you control get +1/+1. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target Spirit you control gains first strike until end of turn. If its mana value is 4 or greater, it gains double strike until end of turn instead.

card.name: Shrinebound Seishin
card.text: Vigilance Shrinebound Seishin can't attack or block alone.

card.name: Recollection's Consumption
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn, create a 2/2 green Spirit creature token. Each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Seijuku Disruptor
card.text: Reach Whenever you draw your second card each turn, up to one target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Escorting Okami
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, if that creature has greater power or toughness than Escorting Okami, Escorting Okami studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Ogura, Nightpack Contractor
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Ogura, Nightpack Contractor attacks, reveal the top seven cards of your library. You may put a nonlegendary Spirit creature card from among them onto the battlefield tapped and attacking, then shuffle.

card.name: Consuming Sorrow
card.text: Flying When Consuming Sorrow enters, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on it. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Soulseek Thrills
card.text: Choose one — • Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life. • Creatures target player controls get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Hidanko Voidshaper
card.text: Hidanko Voidshaper enters tapped. Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, return Hidanko Voidshaper from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Shrinebound Aberrant
card.text: Technique shift {X}{W}{W} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {X}{W}{W} sorcery with only bracketed text.) When Shrinebound Aberrant enters, [b][create X 2/2 green Spirit creature tokens][/b], where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Soul Agency Coroner
card.text: Whenever Soul Agency Coroner or another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Deflecting Byakko
card.text: Technique shift {X}{U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {X}{U} instant with only bracketed text.) Flash When Deflecting Byakko enters, [b][counter up to one target spell unless its controller pays {X}][/b] if it targets you or a permanent you control, where X is the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Aggravating Hellraisers
card.text: Technique shift {2}{R} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {2}{R} instant with only bracketed text.) Whenever Aggravating Hellraisers attacks, other attacking [b][creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.][/b]

card.name: Fervent Idolization
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, Fervent Idolization deals 2 damage to any noncreature target. {3}R: Discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: Supercharged Colossus
card.text: Technique shift {R} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {R} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Reach When Supercharged Colossus enters, [b][Supercharged Colossus deals 1 damage to each creature and planeswalker your opponents control.][/b]

card.name: Soultutored Playwright
card.text: Whenever a Spirit you control with mana value 4 or greater enters, Soultutored Playwright studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.) {T}: Add X mana of any color, where X is Soultutored Playwright's power.

card.name: Rooted Gravegorger
card.text: Technique shift {1}{W} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{W} instant with only bracketed text.) When Rooted Gravegorger enters, [b][Exile target player's graveyard.][/b] Put a +1/+1 counter on Rooted Gravegorger for each nonland card exiled this way.

card.name: Serene Sentinel
card.text: Serene Sentinel doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. Valiant — Whenever Serene Sentinel becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, untap it. It gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Learned Shrinehead
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card.

card.name: Ryu-Blood Yearling
card.text: Trample Ryu-Blood Yearling gets +X/+0, where X is the greatest mana value among Spirits you control.

card.name: Senzao Commute
card.text: Whenever Senzao Commute or a Terminal you control enters, create a 2/2 green Spirit creature token.

card.name: Seijuku Support Drone
card.text: Flying Seijuku Support Drone gets +X/+X, where X is the number of instant, sorcery and cards with technique shift in your graveyard.

card.name: Rageform Shambler
card.text: When Rageform Shambler enters or dies, surveil 1. {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Hidanko Training Blade
Taraikyo Acting Aide
card.text: Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of an instruct ability, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Spirit ONI
card.text: Haste

card.name: Refuse to Fall
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste and trample. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Rapid Draw
card.text: Rapid Draw deals 4 damage to up to one target creature or planeswalker. You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Treasure ONI
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Masborg, Lethal Protector
card.text: Technique shift {1}{W}{U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{W}{U} instant with only bracketed text.) Ward—Pay 4 life. Once during each of your turns, whenever an opponent loses life, you may [b][search your library for a noncreature, nonland card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.][/b]

card.name: Kyoko, City's Hope
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Untap target land. {2}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Transform Kyoko, City's Hope. --- (Back): Kyoko, Chromatichampion

card.name: Kyoko, Chromatichampion
card.text: First strike, vigilance, trample, lifelink, haste. Other creatures you control get +1/+1 and have first strike if they're white, vigilance if they're blue, lifelink if they're black, trample if they're green and haste if they're red. --- (Front): Kyoko, City's Hope

card.name: Hidanko Discipline
card.text: Exile up to one target instant card, sorcery card not named Hidanko Discipline, and/or creature card from your graveyard. For each card exiled this way, you may cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. Exile Hidanko Discipline.

card.name: Seijuku Ingenuity
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among nonland permanents on the battlefield. Destroy all nonland permanents.

card.name: Miyako, the Watched
card.text: Prowess Whenever you cast a black noncreature spell, you may pay 1 life. If you do, create a tapped Treasure token. {2}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Transform Miyako, the Watched. --- (Back): Conduit of Mugeni

card.name: Conduit of Mugeni
card.text: Menace, deathtouch, lifelink Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, copy it if three or more types of mana were spent to cast it. --- (Front): Miyako, the Watched

card.name: Recurring Memories
card.text: Draw X cards. If you've drawn seven or more cards this turn, take an extra turn after this one. Exile Recurring Memories.

card.name: Voidcharged Splitblade
Haiden Consecrator
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Horrific Confidant
card.text: Technique shift {1}{W} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{W} instant with only bracketed text.) When Horrific Confidant enters, [b][creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.][/b]

card.name: Motivating Monitor
card.text: When Motivating Monitor enters, target Advisor creature you control studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Tetsuya, Soulsculptor Strix
card.text: Technique shift {2}{R}{W} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {2}{R}{W} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Flying Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may [b][return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to the battlefield.][/b]

card.name: Spell Pierce
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Dreadbound Skyswimmers
card.text: Technique shift {1}{B} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {1}{B} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Flying Whenever you draw your second card each turn, up to one [b][target player exiles a nontoken creature they control][/b] then returns it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Yoru, Shadow of Regrets
card.text: Technique shift {2}{G}{U} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {2}{G}{U} instant with only bracketed text.) Menace Whenever Yoru, Shadow of Regrets attacks, you may [b][create a token that's a copy of target permanent][/b] card in defending player's graveyard.

card.name: Contracted Dreamculler
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, they discard a card.

card.name: Defy
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose an instant or sorcery card, or a creature card with mana value 4 or greater from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Miyako's Acceptance
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Draw two cards. Flashback {4}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Hotheaded Teacher
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Hollowed Possession
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Discard up to two cards. If you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: Highrise Jumper
card.text: Haste Valiant — Whenever Highrise Jumper becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it has base power and toughness 4/4 and gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Tokuhime, Soul Mediator
card.text: Technique shift {X}{U}{R} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {X}{U}{R} instant with only bracketed text.) When Tokuhime, Soul Mediator enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, you [b][draw X cards, then you may cast a spell with mana value X or less from your hand without paying its mana cost][/b], where X is that creature's power.

card.name: Demolition Club Captain
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Guretani Soulseekers
card.text: Prowess Whenever Guretani Soulseekers attacks, draw a card, then discard a card unless you've drawn three or more cards this turn.

card.name: Emerald-Down Shrinehead
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Flying, first strike, trample

card.name: Night Parade
card.text: For each permanent type, return up to X target cards of that type with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Jun, Ryu Heiress
card.text: Technique shift {4}{U}{U}{U} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {4}{U}{U}{U} sorcery with only bracketed text.)Technique shift (You may cast this spell as a {4}{U}{U}{U} sorcery with only bracketed text.) [+1]: Tap or untap up to one target permanent. Draw a card. [-2]: Return up to two target creatures to their owners' hands. [-9]: Exile all but the bottom ten cards of each opponent's library. Any number of players [b][draw seven cards.][/b]

card.name: Rin, Obstructive Exorcist
card.text: Technique shift {3}{W}{W} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {3}{W}{W} sorcery with only bracketed text.)Technique shift (You may cast this spell as a {3}{W}{W} sorcery with only bracketed text.) [+1]: Until end of turn, creatures target player controls assign combat damage using their toughness rather than their power. [-2]: Create a 0/4 white Spirit creature token. [-6]: [b][Each creature deals damage to itself equal to its power.][/b]

card.name: Freila, Council President
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, it studies that many times. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Overdrive ONI
card.text: Triple all damage sources you control would deal.

card.name: Book of Eternity
card.text: Whenever Book of Eternity enters or a creature dies, put a page counter on Book of Eternity. {T}, Remove X page counters from Book of Eternity: Return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter.

card.name: Traveltime Studies
card.text: Whenever Traveltime Studies enters or you attack with exactly two creatures, target creature you control studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Unwilling Soulqueller
card.text: {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast a Spirit spell or activate an ability of a Spirit source.

card.name: Akira, Hellraisers Sukeban
card.text: Technique shift {5}{R}{R} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {5}{R}{R} sorcery with only bracketed text.)Technique shift (You may cast this spell as a {5}{R}{R} sorcery with only bracketed text.) [+1]: Surveil 1, then exile the top card of your library. You may play it on any turn you attacked. [0]: Create an X/1 red Spirit creature token with haste, where X is Akira's loyalty. Sacrifice it at the beginning of your next upkeep. [-7]: [b][Create a red enchantment token named Overdrive with "Triple all damage sources you control would deal."][/b]

card.name: Trackbound Colossus
card.text: Affinity for Terminals (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Terminal you control.) Flash When Trackbound Colossus enters, tap each creature you don't control and put a stun counter on them.

card.name: Railyard Wayfarer
card.text: Whenever a nontoken Terminal you control enters, create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 1/1 Spirit creature that's still a land.

card.name: Kyoko's Trackstrider
card.text: Vigilance As long as Kyoko's Trackstrider is on the battlefield, in your graveyard, or in your library, it's a Terminal land in addition to its other types. Crew—Tap two untapped Terminals you control.

card.name: Travelled Tag
card.text: {6}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Terminal you control.

card.name: Old Ways Soulseeker
card.text: Old Ways Soulseeker gets +1/+0 for each Terminal you control. As long as you control six or more Terminals, it also has flying and vigilance.

card.name: Student Council Trainee
card.text: When Student Council Trainee enters, it studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Persistent Cursebinder
card.text: Lifelink Whenever one or more creatures you control die, Persistent Cursebinder deals 2 damage to each opponent. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Soulwatcher student
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast noncreature spells. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Guretani Oddsmaker
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, you may draw that many cards.

card.name: Undaunted Enforcer
card.text: {1}{W}: Undaunted Enforcer becomes a Human Advisor with base power and toughness 3/2 and gains lifelink. {3}{W}{W}: If Undaunted Enforcer isn't a Student, it becomes a 5/5 Avatar Advisor and gains flying and first strike.

card.name: Overprotective Teacher
card.text: Flash When Overprotective Teacher enters, tap up to one target creature. It can't become untapped for as long as you control an Advisor.

card.name: Voidless Gateway
card.text: When Voidless Gateway enters, exile up to two target nonland permanents. At the beginning of your upkeep, each player exiles the top two cards of their library. You may cast a spell from among cards exiled with Voidless Gateway without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Track Club Sprinter
card.text: Haste Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Whenever this creature becomes blocked, it deals 1 damage to each creature blocking it.

card.name: Call of the Ryujin
card.text: Return up to one target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Call of the Ryujin deals 4 damage to any target. Exile Call of the Ryujin.

card.name: Contracted Denial
card.text: Counter up to one target spell. Each opponent loses 3 life and you gain that much life.

card.name: Dramatist's Encore
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card in your hand. Discard your hand, then draw X cards. You gain X life.

card.name: Haiden Flourishing
card.text: Draw a card for each differently named land you control.

card.name: Hollow Encounter
card.text: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Hellraiser's Rebuke
card.text: You draw two cards and gain 2 life. Each opponent discards two cards and loses 2 life.

card.name: Risky Business
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Surveil 1.

card.name: Group Class Photo
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. It gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Creatures target player controls get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Turf Encroachment
card.text: Sacrifice a permanent. Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Warped Summons
card.text: Create an X/X Spirit Nightmare creature token that's all colors, where X is the number of permanents you control. Flashback {3}{G}{W}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

[+2]: You draw X cards and each opponent loses X life, where X is one plus the number of creatures that have died this turn. [+1]: Create a 2/2 black Robot Fan artifact creature token with menace. card.text: Menace

card.name: Ogaki, Contracted Vengeant
card.text: Ward {2}, Pay 2 life Creatures you control entering and attacking cause abilities of that creature to trigger as though it had died.

card.name: Soul Agency Sergeant

card.text: Target player draws two cards. Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on each of them.

card.name: City Exploration
card.text: Each of up to X target creatures you control study. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.) Flashback {R}{R}, Discard X cards. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Voidless Confrontation
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a permanent that's tapped or was activated this turn. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Learn From the Best
card.text: Each of up two two target creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain indestructible until end of turn. Untap those creatures.

card.name: Contracted Ruin
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a permanent with mana value 2 or less. Exile target nonland permanent. Its controller draws a card.

card.name: Taraikyo Paragon
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you gain life, Taraikyo Paragon studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Satomi, Scathing Critic
card.text: Technique shift {3}{B}{G} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {3}{B}{G} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Flash When Satomi, Scathing Critic enters, [b][destroy all artifacts and creatures][/b] that were activated this turn or are tapped.

card.name: Sneak Deployment
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you may pay {R}. If you do, you may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. That creature gains haste. At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice that creature.

card.name: Soul Spite
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may behold a Spirit. (Choose a Spirit you control or reveal a Spirit card from your hand.) Soul Spite deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If a creature was beheld, it deals damage equal to that creature's power instead.

card.name: Shrineguard Trainee
card.text: Ward—Pay life equal to Shrineguard Trainee's power. Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, Shrineguard Trainee studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Soul Agency Quartermaster
card.text: Flash Whenever another Advisor you control enters, Soul Agency Quartermaster gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Surveil 1.

card.name: Beckoned Beyond
card.text: Create an X/X Spirit nightmare creature token that's all colors, where X is the number of cards in your hand. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you may discard a card. If you do, return Beckoned Beyond from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Vielle, Aekyan Transfer
card.text: Deathtouch, protection from legendary. Vielle, Aekyan Transfer enters with a number of loyalty counters on it equal to the amount of mana spent to cast it. When it does, exile up to one target planeswalker card from a graveyard with equal or lesser mana value. Vielle gains its loyalty abilities.

card.name: Satsuki, Council Vice
card.text: Flying Other Advisors you control get +1/+1. Whenever Satsuki, Council Vice attacks you may pay {X}{X}. If you do, create a tapped token that's a copy of another target Advisor you control with mana value X or less.

card.name: Tenkami Head Nurse
card.text: Flying Whenever Tenkami Head Nurse or another Advisor you control enters, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Akigara Station
card.text: Akigara Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {R} or {G}."

card.name: Senzao Station
card.text: Senzao Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {G} or {U}."

card.name: Kitakui Station
card.text: Kitakui Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {G} or {W}."

card.name: Aerport Station
card.text: Aerport Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {W} or {U}."

card.name: Hebika Station
card.text: Hebika Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {B} or {G}."

card.name: Hiruya Station
card.text: Hiruya Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {U} or {R}."

card.name: Aoyama Station
card.text: Aoyama Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {W} or {B}."

card.name: Tenkami Station
card.text: Tenkami Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {R} or {W}."

card.name: Leisure District Exit
card.text: As Leisure District Exit enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {R}."

card.name: Back-Alleys Exit
card.text: As Back-Alleys Exit enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {B}."

card.name: Outskirts Exit
card.text: As Outskirts Exit enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {W}."

card.name: Central Subway Exit
card.text: As Central Subway Exit enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {U}."

card.name: Soul Border Exit
card.text: As Soul Border Exit enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {G}."

card.name: Guretani Station
card.text: Guretani Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {B} or {R}."

card.name: Okirumi Station
card.text: Okirumi Station enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. Other Terminals you control have "{T}: Add {U} or {B}."

card.name: Bloodsoaked Void Line
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}{R}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice Bloodsoaked Void Line: It deals 2 damage to any noncreature target. Other Terminals you control have "{2}{R}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: It deals 2 damage to any noncreature target."

card.name: Engulfed Void Line
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}{U}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice Engulfed Void Line: Surveil 2, then draw a card. Other Terminals you control have "{2}{U}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Surveil 2, then draw a card."

card.name: Overwhelmed Void Line
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}{W}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice Overwhelmed Void Line: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Other Terminals you control have "{2}{W}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped."

card.name: Wilted Void Line
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}{G}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice Wilted Void Line: Create a 2/2 green Spirit creature token. You gain 2 life. Other Terminals you control have "{2}{G}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a 2/2 green Spirit creature token. You gain 2 life."

card.name: Consumed Void Line
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}{B}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice Consumed Void Line: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Other Terminals you control have "{2}{B}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand."

card.name: Copy ONI
card.text: This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.

card.name: Icon of Idolization
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink Other creatures have base power and toughness 1/1 and lose all abilities. {1}{W}, Discard Icon of Idolization: Target creature has base power and toughness 1/1 and loses all abilities until end of turn.

card.name: Mysteries of Miyakawa
card.text: You may sacrifice two lands rather than pay the mana cost for spells you cast.

card.name: A Snapshot at Peace
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Exile target spell or nonland permanent. Counter all activated and triggered abilities from nonland sources.

card.name: Cinematic Tutor
card.text: Vigilance Valiant — Whenever Cinematic Tutor becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, create a 1/1 white and black Student creature token.

card.name: Gate-Guard Komainu
card.text: Instruct (Whenever this creature attacks, up to one other target attacking creature gains the following abilities until end of turn.) At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if you attacked this turn.

card.name: Cityrazer Titan
card.text: Trample Nonbasic lands are mountains. {X}{R}{R}: Other creatures you control get +X/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Bonded Rivals
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Bonded Rivals becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, untap each creature you control. If it's your main or combat phase, there is an additional combat phase after this phase.

card.name: Down With Me
card.text: You may choose a creature target opponent controls. If you do, that player chooses a creature you control. Each creature chosen this way phases out. Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Dragonpride Delinquent
card.text: When Dragonpride Delinquent enters, each player discards a card. Draw a card if you discarded a card this way. Dragonpride Delinquent gets +X/+0, where X is the greatest power among creature cards in all graveyards.

card.name: Possessed Diabolist
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 black Demon Horror creature token.

card.name: Hopebreaker Bulwark
card.text: Technique shift {1}{U}{B} — Instant (You may cast this spell as a {1}{U}{B} instant with only bracketed text.) When Hopebreaker Bulwark enters, you may [b][return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand, then that player discards a card.][/b]

card.name: Cognitoshadow
card.text: Flying, ward {2} Whenever Cognitoshadow deals combat damage to a player, it studies. (Exile the top card of your library. You may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, you may play that card this turn.)

card.name: Junko, Tenkami's Favored
card.text: Technique shift {1}{G}{W} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {1}{G}{W} sorcery with only bracketed text.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may [b][exile target nonland permanent][/b] you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Darkblood Pactmaker
card.text: Deathtouch Sacrifice another creature: Each opponent loses 1 life. Surveil 1.

card.name: Bloodline Rejector
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant, sorcery or dragon spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Bloodline Rejector. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Haiden Pactbreaker
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you draw your second card each turn, tap or untap up to one target nonland permanent.

card.name: Graven Guardian
card.text: When Graven Guardian enters, target Spirit you control deals damage equal to its power to any target. You gain that much life. {2}{R}{G}: Double Graven Guardian's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Teachings Past
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control with mana value 3 or less leave the battlefield, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Taraikyo Expression
card.text: Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 4 or less from among them onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. For each of those creatures, put your choice of a trample, lifelink, or haste counter on it.

card.name: Late-Night Line Practice
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Seijuku Programmer
card.text: Lifelink, prowess

card.name: Mezu Dreadbearer
card.text: Menace, prowess Mezu Dreadbearer has indestructible as long as you've cast a creature and a noncreature spell this turn.

card.name: Part-Time Mascot
card.text: Technique shift {2}{U}{U} — Sorcery (You may cast this spell as a {2}{U}{U} sorcery with only bracketed text.) {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. {6}{U}, {T}: [b][Draw three cards][/b], then discard a card.

card.name: Reminiscent Archivist
card.text: When Reminiscent Archivist enters, Reveal the top three cards of your library. You may put an Advisor or noncreature, nonland card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard.
